name: Virus Survivor
short_description: Virus Survivor is an action meat pigeon game, where you will eliminate many germs, challenge powerful super germs, and learn skills to strengthen your characters at the same time.
detailed_description: Virus Survivor is an action meat pigeon game, where you will eliminate many germs, challenge powerful super germs, and learn skills to strengthen your characters at the same time. You will become a cell defender, use loot to upgrade weapons, unlock new characters, and improve talents, all of which are for greater power, automatic attack, and simple operation, just need to control the WASD key to play easily.
about_the_game: Virus Survivor is an action meat pigeon game, where you will eliminate many germs, challenge powerful super germs, and learn skills to strengthen your characters at the same time. You will become a cell defender, use loot to upgrade weapons, unlock new characters, and improve talents, all of which are for greater power, automatic attack, and simple operation, just need to control the WASD key to play easily.
